---
# Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
# Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial
title: "Submit documents"
date: last-modified
aliases:
  - /guide/submit-for-approval.html
  - /guide/model-documentation/submit-for-approval.html
---

{{< include /guide/documentation/_submit-for-approval.qmd >}}

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] The record is registered in the inventory.[^1]
- [x] The approval workflow has been configured by an administrator.[^2]
- [x] You are a [{{< fa code >}} Developer]{.bubble} or [{{< fa circle-check >}} Validator]{.bubble}, or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to perform the tasks in this guide.[^3]

:::

## Verify workflows

{{< include /guide/workflows/_review-active-workflows.qmd >}}

## Advance workflows

{{< include /guide/workflows/_transition-workflows.qmd >}}

{{< include /guide/workflows/_transition-workflow-examples.qmd >}}


<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Register records in the inventory](/guide/inventory/register-records-in-inventory.qmd)

[^2]: [Configure workflows](/guide/workflows/configure-workflows.qmd)

[^3]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)
